hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"PROJECT RULE (enforced): FIRST log this user request to project-requirements.xlsx via the requirements-tracker skill - one row per distinct request, classified, rows kept sorted by date+time - and only then implement. code=$(git status --porcelain -- src server server.js 2>/dev/null | grep -c .); docs=$(git status --porcelain -- SERVICES.md ARCHITECTURE.md REFACTOR_LOG.md data-model.md DEV_GUIDE.md README.md 2>/dev/null | grep -c .); if [ "$code" -gt 0 ] && [ "$docs" -eq 0 ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"\ud83d\udcdd \u05e7\u05d5\u05d3 \u05d4\u05e9\u05ea\u05e0\u05d4 (src/server) \u05d0\u05da \u05d4\u05ea\u05d9\u05e2\u05d5\u05d3 \u05dc\u05d0 \u2014 \u05d4\u05e8\u05e5 /sync-docs \u05dc\u05e1\u05e0\u05db\u05e8\u05d5\u05df SERVICES/ARCHITECTURE/REFACTOR_LOG."}'; fi
